ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Elara's response is relevant to the context and consistent with her persona as a suspicious Gatekeeper, but could be more natural in tone.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>Baseline note: This lacks any reference to the specific scenario or Elara's persona and is not personalized at all, hence low scores across categories except naturalness.
